title: french fashioned french chocolate mille-feuille
description: a citrusy and adventurous twist on the classic mille-feuille pastry, featuring wok-hei and plain chocolate, served in a bamboo steamer

ingredients.name: puff pastry
ingredients.notes: thawed and chilled, cut into 1-inch squares

instructions: brush the puff pastry squares with the lemon juice and softened butter.
arrange a layer of puff pastry squares in the bamboo steamer, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
brush the pastry with a thin layer of orange marmalade and sprinkle with orange zest.
repeat the layering process 2-3 more times, finishing with a layer of pastry on top.
fold the pastry strips over the filling to create a neat, mille-feuille-inspired design.
place the bamboo steamer over boiling water and steam for 10 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
remove the steamer from the heat and let cool for 2 minutes before serving.
